Gifts.title: Gift registry
Gifts.heading: Wedding gift registry
Gifts.body: Dear ones, having you near us on our wedding day is the most beautiful gift of all. For those who'd like to offer something more, we've set up a gift registry for the essentials that will help us build our first steps together. Thank you from the bottom of our hearts for your love and your wishes!

Schedule.title: Wedding schedule
Schedule.intro: So we're all on the same page — and you don't miss a thing between the church, the rice, and the first dance.
Schedule.heading: Wedding schedule

items.title: Cake cutting
items.subtitle: Head to the venue, we'll be waiting

items.caption: The bride's entrance felt like a movie scene. No exaggeration — she really did wear white.
Reached the day we'd been waiting for. Share photos, small videos and wishes — we want to remember the night through your eyes.

Quiz.title: How well do you know us? Answer and see the results! 🎉
